_comment: Sample agent summary strings (raw text returned by subagents) for parser fixtures. Each entry mirrors a real subagent return; parsers must handle these schemas robustly.

challengerSummaries.complete_with_critical:
STATUS: complete
FINDINGS: [{"severity":"critical","category":"assumption","message":"phase-runner cannot spawn codex:codex-rescue — engine restriction confirmed by v4.0.1 commit a7cdffd"},{"severity":"major","category":"design","message":"fallback path docs lag implementation"}]
NOTES: deep audit done; recommend revising phase-runner Type field semantics
challengerSummaries.complete_no_findings:
STATUS: complete
FINDINGS: []
NOTES: no critical issues; advance
challengerSummaries.complete_lenient_format:
STATUS: complete
FINDINGS: [{severity:"critical", category:"boundary", message:"off-by-one in Kahn topo when phase has zero deps"}]
NOTES: ok
challengerSummaries.error_spawn_failed:
STATUS: error
NOTES: codex:rescue plugin spawn refused — plugin likely not installed; degrade to general-purpose

verifySummaries.complete_critical_drift:
STATUS: complete
FINDINGS: [{"severity":"critical","category":"race","message":"commit drift detected between phase-runner self-impl and main thread state"}]
NOTES: needs revision; phase-runner must commit before returning summary
verifySummaries.complete_clean:
STATUS: complete
FINDINGS: []
NOTES: looks good; tests pass; typecheck pass
verifySummaries.complete_mixed:
STATUS: complete
FINDINGS: [{"severity":"critical","category":"race","message":"x"},{"severity":"major","category":"perf","message":"y"}]
NOTES: split severity
verifySummaries.error_crashed:
STATUS: error
NOTES: gemini:rescue spawned but crashed with EACCES on workdir

debateRoundSummaries.propose_round:
STATUS: completed
PROPOSE: use Redis cache layer with write-through and TTL=300s
NOTES: trade-off latency vs. freshness; pick freshness
debateRoundSummaries.challenge_round:
STATUS: completed
CHALLENGE: Redis bottleneck on writes — write-through doubles latency in worst case
NOTES: no critical issue if write rate < 1k/s
debateRoundSummaries.respond_round:
STATUS: completed
RESPOND: switch to write-back cache with periodic flush
NOTES: agreed; converging
debateRoundSummaries.convergence_signal:
STATUS: completed
CHALLENGE: Agreement reached on Redis approach; no new findings
NOTES: ready to commit
